DECLARATION OF CLARICE LIU IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANT THE ESTERLE LLCS MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS (TRANSACTION ID # 65861771) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE ESTERLE LLC, DBA TRAVELODGE BY THE BAY

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT THE ESTERLE LLC, DBA TRAVELODGE BY THE BAY'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 439, WHICH REQUIRES THE PARTIES TO "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE FILING A MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. DEFENDANT FAILED TO FILE A DECLARATION WITH ITS MOVING PAPERS AS REQUIRED BY SECTION 439(A)(3). COUNSEL'S AUGUST 19, 2020 DECLARATION ON REPLY REFERENCES AN ATTEMPT TO MEET AND CONFER IN CONNECTION WITH THE INITIAL CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE, NOT THE MJOP. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

Defendant The Esterle Llc Notice Of Motion And Motion On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Oct-08-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Arlo Garcia Uriarte (415-695-1000; arlo@liberationlawgroup.com) for Plaintiffs.
Clarice C. Liu (415-288-8622; ccl@liuemploymentlaw.com) for Defendant.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE ESTERLE LLC, DBA TRAVELODGE BY THE BAY's Motion On The Pleadings is denied in its entirety. (see word minute for details.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Defendant The Esterle Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Aug-26-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE ESTERLE LLC, DBA TRAVELODGE BY THE BAY's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.

Off calendar for failure to comply with Code of Civil Procedure section 439, which requires the parties to "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before filing a motion for judgment on the pleadings. Defendant failed to file a declaration with its moving papers as required by section 439(a)(3). Counsel's August 19, 2020 declaration on reply references an attempt to meet and confer in connection with the initial case management conference, not the MJOP.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, NOT Reported. =(302/EPS)
